text.value: Education on using proper eye treatment
Providing a referral for an eye examination
Specify the additional services you provided to the client
Have you provided additional services to the client?
Choose a time since you started having eye problems
Have you ever gone to a health facility and had your eyes examined?
Examine the client's eyes without touching them as instructed in the guide.
Which of these problems do you have?
Poor vision (Can't see far or near)
What is your problem and when did it start?
Do you have any eye problems?
I am referring you to a health facility for eye treatment. I will return in a few days to complete this referral.
There is cloudiness in the front part of the eye
The eyelids do not close properly
The appearance of the eyes is not normal
The pupil is not round and not black
The white part is not white
I was advised to wear glasses

Usimsomee, jaza wewe (CHV). Press the button below to capture GPS coordinates for the house. You will know the data has been captured if you see numbers appear in the four boxes below - you don't need to write anything yourself in these boxes. It may take some time for the numbers to appear. If you are waiting more than one minute and the numbers have not appeared, you should move on to the rest of the form without them.
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Did you go to the health center?
Went on a different day than scheduled
Reasons for not attending the health center:
Went on a different day than scheduled
Reasons for not getting an eye examination and treatment
Did you receive an eye examination and treatment?
Elimu ya usafi wa mazingira ya nyumbani
Elimu ya kuboresha afya ya macho
Elimu ya kutumia tiba sahihi za macho
Kutoa rufaa ya uchunguzi wa macho
Ainisha huduma za ziada ulizotoa kwa mteja:
Je umetoa huduma za ziada kwa mteja?
Chagua muda tangu umeanza kupata shida ya macho
Je umewahi kwenda kituo cha afya na kuchunguzwa macho?
Mchunguze mteja macho bila kumgusa kama ulivyoelekezwa kwenye mwongozo.
Je una tatizo lipi kati ya haya
Je una shida gani na imeanza lini?
Je, una shida yoyote ya macho?
Nakupa rufaa kwenda kituo cha afya kupata matibabu ya macho. Nitarudi siku chache badae kukamilisha rufaa hii.
Kuna ukungu sehemu ya mbele ya jicho
Mifuniko ya macho haifuniki sawa sawa
Mboni sio ya duara na sio nyeusi

Usimsomee, jaza wewe (CHV). Bonyeza kitufe hichi kupata GPS ya nyumba hii. Utatambua kuwa taarifa zimepatikana endapo utaona nambari zinatokea kwenye jadueli nne chini. Hutakiwi kuandika chochote kwenye jadueli hizi. Inaweza kuchukua muda kidogo mpaka nambari kutokea. Ukiona umesubiria kwa zaidi ya dakika moja na hakuna nambari iliyotokea, tafadhali endelea kujaza fomu yako bila ya kuzisubiria zaidi.
Alienda siku nyingine tofauti na aliyopangiwa
Sababu za kutokuhudhuria kituo cha afya:
Alienda siku nyingine tofauti na aliyopangiwa
Sababu za kutokuchunguzwa na kutibiwa macho:
Je ulipata huduma ya uchunguzi na matibabu ya macho?

bind.relevant: selected( /eye_care/eye_care/has_eye_problems ,"yes") and selected( /eye_care/eye_care/ever_gone_health_facility_test_eye ,"no") and (selected( /eye_care/eye_care/specify_examination_results ,"eyes_appearance_not_normal") or selected( /eye_care/eye_care/specify_examination_results ,"white_part_not_white") or selected( /eye_care/eye_care/specify_examination_results ,"cloudiness_in_front_of_eye") or selected( /eye_care/eye_care/specify_examination_results ,"pupil_not_round_not_black"))
